name: vw-mcp
description: Drive a VisualWorks 9.3.1 image through the VW Runtime API HTTP API. Exposes 48 tools (18 MVP + 13 V2 + 17 V3) spanning liveness, code reading/navigation/description, NATIVE-TYPED scaffolders (class + windowSpec + ApplicationModel + dialog + parcel), method compile/define/delete, UI inspect/drive/dialogs/wait/screenshot, parcel load/unload/create, class introspection (fingerprint/hierarchy/export/search), and SUnit testing (run + describe failure).
long_description: MCP server bridging Claude Desktop into a live VisualWorks 9.3.1 image via the VW Runtime API HTTP endpoint at http://127.0.0.1:9876. Requires the VW Runtime API to be running (Start-VWBridge.bat) and VW_RUNTIME_API_HOME env var set. Built for the MAS / Old Mutual Wealth WEALTH (storedev64.im) deployment but works against any VW Runtime API instance.

bridge_url.title: Bridge URL
bridge_url.description: URL where the VW Runtime API HTTP listener is running. Default works for local single-developer setups.

token_file.title: Path to bridge .token file
token_file.description: Absolute path to the bridge's .token file. Bridge rotates this on every cold-start; mcp-vw re-reads on every call.

single_owner.title: Enforce single-owner lock (recommended)
single_owner.description: Prevent two mcp-vw processes from talking on the same stdio channel. Claude Desktop on Windows MSIX has historically spawned duplicate MCP servers; this guard catches that. Set to false only for parallel dev/test workflows.

tools.name: vw_health
tools.description: Auth-exempt liveness check. Returns {status, version}.

tools.name: vw_version
tools.description: Auth-exempt build metadata. Returns {version, buildCommitSha, buildTimestamp, parcelMode}.

tools.name: vw_status
tools.description: Composite: /health + /version + a cheap eval probe.

tools.name: vw_eval
tools.description: Evaluate arbitrary Smalltalk via /eval. Escape hatch — prefer typed tools first. Bug #5 + #41 guards.

tools.name: vw_list_namespaces
tools.description: List every namespace in the VW image (~312 entries).

tools.name: vw_list_namespace_entries
tools.description: List bindings in a single namespace.

tools.name: vw_get_class_definition
tools.description: Get class definition source (subclass: form).

tools.name: vw_list_methods
tools.description: List methods (side + category + selector) for a class.

tools.name: vw_find_senders
tools.description: Find Class>>selector pairs sending a selector. Cap 500. Optional scope.

tools.name: vw_create_class
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED class creator: emits canonical subclass:... Smalltalk from JSON params. Refuses VWB.* (#41).

tools.name: vw_open_application
tools.description: Open an ApplicationModel subclass. Refuses VWB.*.

tools.name: vw_list_windows
tools.description: Enumerate live VW windows.

tools.name: vw_describe_window
tools.description: Get widget tree of a named window.

tools.name: vw_click
tools.description: Click a named widget in a live VW window.

tools.name: vw_type
tools.description: Set the value of an input field.

tools.name: vw_load_parcel
tools.description: Load a binary .pcl parcel from disk.

tools.name: vw_unload_parcel
tools.description: Unload a parcel by name (Notification-resume per #38). Refuses VWBridge.

tools.name: vw_list_loaded_parcels
tools.description: List names of loaded parcels.

tools.name: vw_describe_class
tools.description: Composite class description: definition + comment + instance methods + class methods in one call.

tools.name: vw_find_implementors
tools.description: Find Class>>selector pairs that IMPLEMENT a given selector. Cap 500. Optional scope.

tools.name: vw_find_references_to
tools.description: Find Class>>selector pairs that reference a given global (class name / shared variable). Cap 500.

tools.name: vw_get_widget_value
tools.description: Read live value of an aspect from a running VW window (verifies vw_type/vw_click took effect).

tools.name: vw_create_window_spec
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED canvas/windowSpec emitter: JSON → canonical literal-array form (the probe-3 design unlock). 13 component types.

tools.name: vw_compile_method
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED method compile (instance or class side). Refuses VWB.* (#41).

tools.name: vw_define_action
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED: add an instance-side action method to a class (wraps vw_compile_method).

tools.name: vw_define_aspect
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED: add a lazy-init aspect accessor (the canonical ValueHolder pattern).

tools.name: vw_create_application_model
tools.description: HEAVYWEIGHT NATIVE-TYPED scaffolder: class + ivs + aspect accessors + actions + hooks + windowSpec, all in ONE call.

tools.name: vw_create_dialog
tools.description: NATIVE-TYPED SimpleDialog scaffolder. Same machinery as vw_create_application_model with SimpleDialog default.

tools.name: vw_run_test_class
tools.description: Run every test* selector on a TestCase via the SAFE direct-invoke gate pattern (#20). Returns JSON suite summary.

tools.name: vw_run_test_method
tools.description: Run ONE test method on a TestCase via direct-invoke gate. Returns JSON {result, errorMessage}.

tools.name: vw_list_failing_tests
tools.description: Run every test* selector + return ONLY failures + errors (no passes).

tools.name: vw_list_namespace_classes
tools.description: List ONLY class bindings in a namespace (filter out shared vars).

tools.name: vw_list_all_classes
tools.description: Bulk enumerate every class as Namespace.ClassName. Cap default 5000.

tools.name: vw_list_test_classes
tools.description: Discover TestCase subclasses ending in Test/Tests. Optional scope filter.

tools.name: vw_get_method_fingerprint
tools.description: Behavioral fingerprint (numArgs/numTemps/messages/literals) since sources stripped.

tools.name: vw_get_class_hierarchy
tools.description: Walk superclass chain + direct subclasses. Returns JSON {chain, directSubclasses}.

tools.name: vw_export_class
tools.description: Structural dump: definition + comment + every method with category/numArgs/numMessages.

tools.name: vw_search_method_messages
tools.description: Find methods that SEND any selector containing a substring. Cap 500.

tools.name: vw_compile_class_definition
tools.description: Compile raw class definition Smalltalk. Refuses VWB.* + Bug #5 substrings.

tools.name: vw_delete_method
tools.description: DESTRUCTIVE: remove a method via removeSelector:. Refuses VWB.*.

tools.name: vw_delete_class
tools.description: DESTRUCTIVE: remove a class via removeFromSystem. Requires confirm:true. Refuses VWB.*.

tools.name: vw_set_class_comment
tools.description: Set the class comment text. Refuses VWB.*.

tools.name: vw_list_dialogs
tools.description: Enumerate live modal SimpleDialog instances.

tools.name: vw_respond_dialog
tools.description: Click a named button on the currently-posted modal dialog.

tools.name: vw_wait
tools.description: Block until a UI predicate is satisfied. Predicates: windowExists, aspectEquals, aspectNotEmpty, dialogExists, dialogGone.

tools.name: vw_screenshot
tools.description: Capture PNG of screen or a window. Returns MCP ImageContent (base64) for direct rendering.

tools.name: vw_describe_test_failure
tools.description: Re-run a single failing test + capture structured exception details (class, message, stack snippet).

tools.name: vw_create_parcel
tools.description: HEAVYWEIGHT: build a binary .pcl parcel from typed JSON spec. Cursor monkey-patch + canonical parcelOutOn: pattern. Refuses VWB.* targets (#41).
